message:
Running command: echo "=== Looking for actual librelane-wrapped process ==="
pgrep -f ".librelane-wrapped" 2>/dev/null | while read pid; do
  CMD=$(cat /proc/$pid/cmdline 2>/dev/null | tr '\0' ' ' | head -c 200)
  echo "PID $pid: $CMD"
done

echo ""
echo "=== Looking for openroad ==="
pgrep -f "openroad" 2>/dev/null | while read pid; do
  CMD=$(cat /proc/$pid/cmdline 2>/dev/null | tr '\0' ' ' | head -c 100)
  echo "PID $pid: $CMD"
done

echo ""
echo "=== LibreLane flow.log ==="
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
cat "$WRAPPER_RUN/flow.log" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== error.log ==="
cat "$WRAPPER_RUN/error.log" 2>/dev/null && echo "(no errors)" || echo "(file not found)"
